narrative:
Etna Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,570 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.7 percentage points.
